category_sources: source_facts.description says libpq is the Postgres C API library; official PostgreSQL docs describe libpq as the C application programmer's interface.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libpq; official PostgreSQL documentation chapter is titled libpq.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official PostgreSQL libpq documentation; official docs page is dedicated to libpq.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official PostgreSQL documentation says to clone the official Git mirror from https://git.postgresql.org/git/postgresql.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names the Postgres C API library; official docs identify libpq as the PostgreSQL C client interface.
